query:
-- Billing items with serviceExternalId set but no service_billing_assignment
SELECT COUNT(*) as bi_with_service_no_assignment,
       SUM(lineAmount) as total_revenue
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL 
  AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
  AND bi.matchStatus = 'service-matched'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
    WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
  );

FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL

  AND bi.matchStatus = 'service-matched'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba
